name: verifiedx
description: Install and audit VerifiedX through the smallest real seam in an existing codebase. VerifiedX lives at verifiedx.me and docs.verifiedx.me.

interface.shortDescription: Install VerifiedX into an existing repo
interface.longDescription: Inspect the current codebase, detect the smallest supported seam, and run the one-shot VerifiedX installer so the repo is patched, configured, and verified at the action boundary without redesigning the system.
defaultPrompt: Install VerifiedX into this repo by running `npx -y @verifiedx-core/sdk@latest install --cwd .`. Agentic install is the default. Let the installer drive the coding agent end to end. If it explicitly pauses for manual steering, continue the same agentic flow from `.verifiedx/agentic-runner-prompt.md`, `.verifiedx/agentic-playbook.md`, and `.verifiedx/agentic-review.json`, decide topology as `single` or `multi_agent` from the real codebase, classify repo-owned custom methods from real repo semantics instead of guessing, then finish with `npx -y @verifiedx-core/sdk@latest apply-agentic-review --cwd .`.
Audit this repo's VerifiedX integration against docs.verifiedx.me and tell me what is missing.
